title: Delicious Chocolate
description: Mod that adds new type of food, chocolate!
body:
# Delicious Chocolate
The Delicious Chocolate mod brings the joy of crafting chocolate into your Minecraft world! Create delicious treats like the Chocolate Bar, Small Chocolate Bar or Hot Chocolate using a balanced crafting system that involves new blocks and recipes.

![Chocolate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ca2ee6d11bed37c90c778224e99a1ef0315d53c4_0.webp)

### New Items:
- Chocolate Bar - Food that restores 8 hunger points.
- Small Chocolate Bar - Snack that restores 4 hunger points.
- Hot Chocolate - A warm drink that restores 8 hunger points.
- Chocolate Bar Mold - Item that is used in Chocolate Casting Table to make Chocolate bar
- Small Chocolate Bar Mold - Item that is used in Chocolate Casting Table to make Small Chocolate bar

### New Blocks:
- Basin - A utility block for mixing ingredients to create liquid chocolate.
- Chocolate Casting Table - A table for casting liquid chocolate into delicious food

## Crafting Chocolate Tutorial:

### Create Liquid Chocolate:

**1.** Craft a Basin and place it in the world.

**2.** Interact with the Basin to add ingredients:

- Milk: Place in the top slot (requires a bucket).
- Cocoa Beans and Sugar: Place in the side slots.

**3.** Once all ingredients are added, the Basin will produce a Bucket of Liquid Chocolate.


![crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/80ec818f338245ae46362eedddf282ad16f67779.png)

### Cast Chocolate:

**1.** Craft a Chocolate Casting Table and place it in the world.

**2.** Interact with the Table to add:
- Mold: Place in the top slot (choose between the Chocolate Bar Mold, Small Chocolate Bar Mold or Bottle).
- Bucket of Liquid Chocolate: Place in the side slot.

**3.** And your Chocolate is Done!

![crafting2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e741bccbd20b182da27270ff49009a0231e9f807.png)

### **It's recommended to download [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) with this mod**
